title: sceletium tortuosum
intro: Sceletium tortuosum, also known as kouebo or "mesem" in Afrikaans, is a succulent plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Aizoaceae family. Traditionally, the plant's stems and leaves have been used for their medicinal properties, particularly for their potential to treat anxiety, insomnia, and depression due to their content of alkaloids such as mesembrine. The health benefits associated with sceletium tortuosum include its adaptogenic properties, which help the body adapt to stress, as well as its anxiolytic and sedative effects. Sceletium tortuosum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, extracts, and capsules, which can be used to support mental well-being and promote relaxation.
